ValidationRule.description: When Lead Source = Employee Referral, the Employee Referral Name field must be populated.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $UserRole.Name <> 'System Administrator', $User.User_Id__c <> '0054V00000FQ5sTQAT', ISPICKVAL(LeadSource, 'Employee Referral'), ISBLANK(Employee_Referral_Name__c), OR ( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(LeadSource), ISCHANGED(Employee_Referral_Name__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When Lead Source = Employee Referral, the Employee Referral Name field must be populated.
